jsonLd.title: Pickrr is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pickrr! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pickrr:
Pickrr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pickrr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
